lesson_title: Places, Directions and Local Life: Writing Lesson 6
learning_objective: Learners can name, identify, ask and answer basic questions in a writing task about numbers.
cefr_outcome: Learners can understand and use familiar everyday expressions and very basic phrases for immediate needs.
learner_facing_explanation: In this lesson you will practise writing for places, directions and local life. You will learn useful language connected to numbers and practise present simple. By the end, you should be able to complete a short real-life task and explain your answer clearly at A1 level.
complete_teaching_input: Focus language: present simple. Vocabulary theme: numbers. The teacher introduces the target language in a meaningful context, models pronunciation and form, checks meaning with concept questions, and moves learners from controlled practice to freer use. At A1, learners should name, identify, ask and answer basic questions with increasing independence. The lesson should use board examples, short teacher modelling, pair practice, feedback and a final communicative task.
examples: Example 1: I can use present simple to talk about numbers.
Example 2: The learner gives a A1 answer with clear meaning and correct key language.
Example 3: The learner checks, improves and repeats the answer after feedback.
Example 4: The learner uses one linking phrase or support phrase suitable for A1.

interactive_practice.prompt: Choose the best sentence using present simple.
options: Correct use of present simple in a A1 sentence.
Incorrect word order with present simple.
interactive_practice.feedback_correct: Correct. The sentence uses present simple accurately.
interactive_practice.feedback_incorrect: Check the form and meaning of present simple.

interactive_practice.prompt: Match the numbers phrase to its meaning.
interactive_practice.feedback_correct: Good matching. You understand the phrase meaning.
interactive_practice.feedback_incorrect: Look again at the context and key words.

interactive_practice.prompt: Build a complete answer for the lesson task.
interactive_practice.model_answer: I can explain my idea clearly because I understand numbers.
interactive_practice.feedback_correct: Well done. Your sentence is complete and meaningful.
interactive_practice.feedback_incorrect: Check that your sentence has a subject, verb and clear meaning.

correct_answers.P3: I can explain my idea clearly because I understand numbers.

instant_feedback.correct: Correct. Continue to the next step.
instant_feedback.partly_correct: Good start. Check accuracy and add one more detail.
instant_feedback.incorrect: Try again. Review the model and look at the key language.

teacher_notes: Begin with a quick diagnostic question. Model the target form present simple. Use choral repetition if pronunciation is important. Monitor pair work and record three common errors. Finish with delayed correction and one confidence-building success point.
homework_task: Write or record five sentences about numbers using language from this lesson.

assessment_task.task_title: A1 Writing Check - Places, Directions and Local Life
assessment_task.instructions: Complete a short writing task using present simple and vocabulary from numbers.
success_criteria: Uses present simple with reasonable accuracy
Responds at the expected CEFR level

criteria.name: Language control
criteria.descriptor: Uses present simple and sentence structure accurately.

criteria.name: Vocabulary range
criteria.descriptor: Uses appropriate words connected to numbers.

criteria.name: Fluency/coherence
criteria.descriptor: Organises ideas clearly for the level.

speaking_task: Speak for 60-120 seconds about numbers. Use at least two examples and one reason.
writing_task: Write a short A1 response about numbers. Include the target language: present simple.

listening_audio.script: Audio script for A1-M04-L06. Speaker one: Today we are practising numbers. Speaker two: I need to use present simple correctly. Speaker one: Listen carefully and choose the answer that best matches the meaning.

visual_activity_cards.title: Present Simple form
visual_activity_cards.alt_text: Visual grammar card for present simple
